_comment: House ad rotation — internal cross-promo and Capt. Dane / sister-site campaigns. Used when no direct sponsor matches. Multiple matching house ads are weighted-randomly selected via rotation_weight (default 1.0 each). Tier 2 by convention.

creative.headline: Sunset Charter with Capt. Dane
creative.description: Private 6-passenger boat. Champagne included. Local Key West captain.

creative.alt: Heading to the Caribbean? Visit WanderUSVI for tour discovery in St. Thomas, St. John, St. Croix.
